name: A pilot study of senolytics to improve cognition and mobility in older adults at risk for Alzheimer's disease
summary: 2025 EBioMedicine single-arm pilot of intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin in 12 older adults at risk for Alzheimer's disease, reporting feasibility, no intervention-related serious adverse events, exploratory cognition and TNF-alpha signals, and explicit caution because there was no control group.
